title: Supreme Court awards ₹11 lakh compensation to convict kept in jail for 24 days after parole order
description: The Supreme Court on Friday directed the State of Rajasthan to pay ₹11 lakh in compensation to a convict who remained in prison for 24 days despite a High Court order directing his release on parole [Daudayal v. State of Rajasthan].A Bench of Justices Sanjay Karol and AG Masih held that the State could not continue depriving a person of liberty merely because officials were considering whether whether they should challenge a judicial order granting parole."The liberty of an individual is not a t
